query: Investigate this bug — killing the last enemy in a wave never advances to the next wave. Trace the cause and grade your confidence.
The framerate intermittently tanks during big firefights and we can't reproduce it in the editor. Build a case file from what we have and tell me what's confirmed vs hypothesized.
I need to understand this unfamiliar combat/wave system before I change it — walk the code and build a mental model.
Just fix the guard in on_enemy_died and update the test.
Run a code review on this gameplay pull request before I merge.
Create the next story for the wave-spawning epic.
